title: Founder Operating System
promise: Operating maturity diagnostic for founder focus, decisions, metrics, and sustainability.
audience: Founders and CEOs from pre-seed to Series B, executive coaches, and accelerators
description: Operating maturity assessment across Focus & Trade-offs, Decision Cadence, Metrics & Evidence, Personal Sustainability. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: Operating maturity diagnostic for founder focus, decisions, metrics, and sustainability.
